name: NBA All Star Dylan Wang
overview: The 4-episode Tencent Video reality mini-series follows Dylan Wang's 2024 NBA All-Star Game journey. As the Tencent NBA Experience Ambassador, Wang travels to Indiana to serve as a commentator for the event, immersing himself in the local basketball culture. He also participates in the All-Star Celebrity Game and meets his idol, LeBron James.

trailers.title: 第1期完整版：启程NBA圆梦之旅！王鹤棣与哈里伯顿展开1V1友情局 畅聊偶像詹姆斯！丨《棣一次全明星》EP1 FULL #NBA
